scripts.release:pack: sh -c 'test -f .npm-auth-token || (echo "Missing .npm-auth-token (see docs/CONTRIBUTING.md)." >&2; exit 1); TOKEN=$(head -n 1 .npm-auth-token | tr -d "\r\n"); test -n "$TOKEN" || (echo "Empty .npm-auth-token (first line)." >&2; exit 1); export YARN_NPM_AUTH_TOKEN="$TOKEN"; yarn build && yarn workspaces foreach -A --include "@chonkylang/*" npm pack'
scripts.release:dry-run: sh -c 'test -f .npm-auth-token || (echo "Missing .npm-auth-token (see docs/CONTRIBUTING.md)." >&2; exit 1); TOKEN=$(head -n 1 .npm-auth-token | tr -d "\r\n"); test -n "$TOKEN" || (echo "Empty .npm-auth-token (first line)." >&2; exit 1); export YARN_NPM_AUTH_TOKEN="$TOKEN"; yarn build && yarn workspaces foreach -A --include "@chonkylang/*" --topological npm publish --access public --dry-run'
scripts.release:publish: sh -c 'test -f .npm-auth-token || (echo "Missing .npm-auth-token (see docs/CONTRIBUTING.md)." >&2; exit 1); TOKEN=$(head -n 1 .npm-auth-token | tr -d "\r\n"); test -n "$TOKEN" || (echo "Empty .npm-auth-token (first line)." >&2; exit 1); export YARN_NPM_AUTH_TOKEN="$TOKEN"; yarn build && yarn workspaces foreach -A --include "@chonkylang/*" --topological npm publish --access public'
scripts.release:publish:env: yarn build && yarn workspaces foreach -A --include "@chonkylang/*" --topological npm publish --access public
